response.original_title: 完全着衣から始まる美しき官能のSEX記録
response.overview: This 2016 SOD Star release offers an intimate, documentary-style look at the popular idol Mao Hamasaki. Featuring high-definition visuals and close-up footage, the film explores her natural charm and raw beauty in a private.
response.tagline: The Art of Sensuality: A Private Record of Mao’s Transformation
response.title: Mao Hamasaki: A Private Record of Aesthetic Sensuality Starting Fully Clothed
